title: The Twelve Chairs
writer: Ilya Ilf, Yevgeni Petrov, Ugo Ulive
actors: Enrique Santisteban, Reynaldo Miravalles, René Sánchez
plot: When her country is taken over by socialist revolutionaries, a wealthy woman can't bear to give up all of her wealth and possessions to the new government, so she hides her jewels in one of the 12 chairs of a dining-room set. Afte...
